entry.title: [GRA][Collaborative solutions] - MX Plan Filerz Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Aug 20, 23:00 UTC  -  Aug 21, 04:00 UTC

Jul 9, 03:16 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our responsibilities for Mail filerz, we will be performing infrastructure maintenance.
The maintenance will update the storage servers hosting your data.
This version brings improvements to certain security mechanisms, as well as some performance enhancements.

Start time : 20/08/2026 23:00 UTC
End time : 21/08/2026 04:00 UTC
Service impact : The service will be temporarily unavailable for 40 minutes during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Mail filerz.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [BHS/GRA][Web Hosting] - Multiple Clusters maintenance notification
entry.content:
Jul 24, 14:11 UTC
Completed - The maintenance is now complete. Thank you for your patience and understanding.

Jul 17, 15:08 UTC
Update - The current maintenance will take more time than expected.
Below you can find the new end time of the operation.
End time : 24/07/2026 18:00 UTC

Jul 13, 14:27 UTC
Update - Scheduled maintenance is still in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 13, 14:25 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jul 13, 14:23 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Web Hosting offer in BHS and GRA regions.

Start time : 13/07/2026 11:00 UTC
End time : 17/07/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : Our services will be partially impacted, with expected latencies on management tasks (domain add/modification, configuration updates, etc.) as well as on some websites during the maintenance.
Linked to this maintenance : https://public-cloud.status-ovhcloud.com/incidents/m5qn00qgl9zh.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Internet Access] - SDSL / ADSL / ADSL / FTTH Incident Notification
entry.content:
Jul 24, 12:32 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Internet Access offer which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 24/07/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 24/07/2026 10:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : PPP authentication service experienced issues.
Customers Impact : Some customers experienced authentication issues when establishing PPP sessions.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a software issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - MX Plan /Email Pro /Hosted Exchange /Private Exchange incident notification
entry.content:
Jul 24, 07:26 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offering has been resolved.

Start time : 20/05/2026 08:42 UTC
End time : 23/07/2026 17:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by our provider.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 22, 13:02 UTC
Monitoring - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Our teams have taken security action on our infrastructure to fix the issue. Customers do not need to take any action.
Ongoing Actions : We are still awaiting a cumulative patch from Microsoft that is expected to address these issues for a definitive fix.
Here a link to follow more information : https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/blog/exchange/released-june-2026-exchange-server-security-updates/4524491
We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jun 15, 12:46 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : We are currently awaiting a patch from Microsoft that is expected to address these issues.
Ongoing Actions : The issue remains under review on their side, and we are actively following up to obtain further updates.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 25, 08:40 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : At this time, we are still awaiting a fix from Microsoft. The issue remains under review on their side, and we are actively following up to obtain further updates.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and the provider is mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 20, 09:05 UTC
Identified - We are waiting for Microsoft Security fix for our Exchange Collaborative solutions MX Plan, Email Pro, Hosted and private to fix some side effects related to mitigation

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 20/05/2026 08:42 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some MX Plan, Email Pro, Hosted Exchange and Private Exchange operations is temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers may have the following issues :
OWA Print Calendar functionality might not work
OWA light mode does not work properly
Signature or images not displayed properly
Preview of attachments not working properly
Public calendar URLs generating error 500 in browser.
Ongoing Actions : We are waiting for Microsoft Security fix for our Exchange Collaborative solutions MX Plan, Email Pro, Hosted and private to fix some side effects related to mitigation.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Cluster131 - Filerz1641 incident notification
entry.content:
Jul 22, 00:34 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offering has been resolved.

Start time : 21/07/2026 21:55 UTC
End time : 22/07/2026 00:23 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 21, 22:08 UTC
Investigating - We are currently investigating an incident affecting our Web Hosting offering, which is causing temporary issue in the Cluster131 - Filerz1641.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 21/07/2026 21:55 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The Filerz1641 is unreachable on Web Hosting Cluster131.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access and use their websites hosted on Filerz1641 - Cluster131.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are investigating to determine the origin of the incident and fix it.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA][Web Hosting] - Cluster105 Incident Notification
entry.content:
Jul 21, 11:24 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Web Hosting offering has been resolved.

Start time : 21/07/2026 10:05 UTC
End time : 21/07/2026 10:30 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 21, 11:01 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Web Hosting offering in the GRA region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 21/07/2026 10:05 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Administrative task processing for Cluster105 is experiencing delays.
Customers Impact : Customers may experience delays, as all deliveries and hosting configuration changes are temporarily paused.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a hardware issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [GLOBAL][Collaborative solutions] - MX Plan Incident Notification
entry.content:
Jul 21, 10:13 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Collaborative solutions offering has been resolved.

Start time : 21/07/2026 09:17 UTC
End time : 21/07/2026 09:46 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a hardware issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Jul 21, 09:48 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Collaborative solutions offering in GLOBAL region.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 21/07/2026 09:17 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : MX Plan mailboxes are temporarily unavailable.
Customer Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their mailboxes.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a hardware issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
